source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/250623 포터블 태국TFDA 등록 요청서류 - 이창민 팀장님/TFDA on Handheld/12. Summary Verification & validation/Summary of Design Verification and Validation documents.docx

document.title: Summary of Design Verification and Validation

sourceSummary.oneLine: Technical construction file summary for design verification and validation of the Portable X-ray System model HnX-P1.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory registration by summarizing applied standards, laboratory tests, risk management, software validation, usability, clinical study, and cybersecurity validation references.
keyPoints: Product is a Portable X-ray System, model HnX-P1, manufactured by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
Report No. is A-FDAP-VV-HNX (Rev.0), prepared, reviewed, and approved on July 07, 2025.
Intended use includes handheld diagnostic imaging of body extremities and stand mounted diagnostic imaging of head, abdomen, extremities, and chest without a grid.
Biocompatibility test and animal test are marked N/A.
Risk management, software validation, usability, clinical study, and cybersecurity documentation are referenced.

entities.name: ACTS Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: ACTS Co., Ltd. appears as the laboratory for IEC 60601 laboratory test reports.

entities.name: KES Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Vibration & Drop test KES Co., Ltd. KES-SA250099 February 12, 2025

entities.name: Korea Testing & Research Institute
entities.evidence: Cybersecurity test Korea Testing & Research Institute EBB-2025-000021 March 17, 2025

entities.name: FCC
entities.evidence: FCC SUB PART C This section of the FCC regulations covers the rules and requirements for devices that intentionally generate and emit radio frequency energy
